L2 substitute 750311385: Saturation current not specified in component data; cannot verify inductor derating requirements.
C19 substitute 890324023004CS: Y-capacitor (safety isolation barrier) substitution lacks explicit safety analysis and certification verification (Y-class, agency approvals vs original).

R8 no_substitute: Zero ohm jumper unavailable from target manufacturer; confirm trace bridge or low-value resistor (≤0.01Ω) acceptable for design intent.
